name: Syra Health Corp
business: Syra Health is an integrated healthcare solutions company serving government and commercial healthcare organizations with prevention-focused, accessible, and affordable solutions that improve health outcomes. We deliver end-to-end capabilities across population health, behavioral and mental health, digital health, health education and training, and healthcare workforce development and staffing.
sellsTo: federal agencies (HHS, CDC, NIH, NASA, DoD)

exposures.sentence: Syrenity is a comprehensive mental health application that is aimed at providing preventative care and interventions for behavioral and mental health and will utilize an artificial intelligence-driven user diary for engagement.
We recruit experienced nurses and allied health professionals for long-term fixed contract positions at hospitals and healthcare facilities across the country.
We are developing end-to-end solutions and strategies to improve quality of care, access to care, health outcomes, and healthcare policies.
With our specialized services, we believe that we can help solve the behavioral and mental health needs of various organizations, including health organizations, large employers, and schools.

catalysts.sentence: We launched Syrenity in the fourth quarter of 2024.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. behavioral health market valued at $151.7 billion in 2023, CAGR 3.7% 2024-2032
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. behavioral health market was valued at $151.7 billion in 2023 and is expected to exhibit growth at a CAGR of 3.7% from 2024 to 2032 per Precedence Research.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. population health management market valued at $25.0 billion in 2022, CAGR 19.5% to $103.7 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. population health management market was valued at $25.0 billion in 2022 and is anticipated to grow at a CAGR of 19.5% from 2022 to 2030, reaching $103.7 billion by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. digital health market estimated at $81.17 billion in 2023, CAGR 19.5% 2024-2030
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. digital health market size was estimated at $81.17 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 19.5% from 2024 to 2030 according to Mercer.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. health education market valued at $110 billion in 2023, CAGR 11.0% to $280.6 billion by 2033
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. health education market was valued at $110 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach approximately $280.6 billion by 2033, growing at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.0% according to a report from Verified Market Research.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. healthcare staffing market valued at $36.9 billion in 2022, CAGR 6.93% 2023-2030
tamClaims.sentence: According to Grand View Research, the U.S. healthcare staffing market size was valued at $36.9 billion in 2022 and is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.93% from 2023 to 2030.
